requirement_topic.en: Restricted Hazardous Substances (no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime in Morocco)
requirement_topic.zh: 限用有害物质（摩洛哥无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 限用有害物質（摩洛哥無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度）

summary.en: Morocco does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime that restricts a fixed list of substances (e.g., the EU's 10: Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE, plus the 4 phthalates DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP) in homogeneous materials across all electrical and electronic equipment as a market-access condition. There is no Moroccan national RoHS that mirrors EU Directive 2011/65/EU. Restricted-substance control in Morocco runs through general chemical management and product-safety / consumer-protection law (notably Law 24-09 on product and service safety) and through contractual buyer/tender requirements, rather than a dedicated EEE substance-restriction list with maximum concentration values. Honest mapping: there is no direct local equivalent to RoHS; substance limits are driven by buyer specifications, the IEC product standards adopted as NM (which embed some material/insulation requirements), and general safety law, not a horizontal RoHS instrument.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥并不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，即不以限制均质材料中固定清单物质（如欧盟 10 项：铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE，加上 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）作为所有电气电子设备的市场准入条件。摩洛哥没有对应欧盟指令 2011/65/EU 的国家 RoHS。摩洛哥的限用物质控制通过一般化学品管理及产品安全/消费者保护法（尤其是关于产品和服务安全的第 24-09 号法律）以及买方/招标合同要求实现，而非专门的 EEE 物质限制清单及最大浓度值。如实对应：不存在 RoHS 的直接本地等效；物质限值由买方规格、采纳为 NM 的 IEC 产品标准（其中嵌入部分材料/绝缘要求）及一般安全法驱动，而非横向 RoHS 工具。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥並不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，即不以限制均質材料中固定清單物質（如歐盟 10 項：鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE，加上 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）作為所有電氣電子設備的市場准入條件。摩洛哥沒有對應歐盟指令 2011/65/EU 的國家 RoHS。摩洛哥的限用物質控制通過一般化學品管理及產品安全/消費者保護法（尤其是關於產品和服務安全的第 24-09 號法律）以及買方/招標合同要求實現，而非專門的 EEE 物質限制清單及最大濃度值。如實對應：不存在 RoHS 的直接本地等效；物質限值由買方規格、採納為 NM 的 IEC 產品標準（其中嵌入部分材料/絕緣要求）及一般安全法驅動，而非橫向 RoHS 工具。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 24-09 on the safety of products and services (Morocco) — general product-safety basis, no dedicated EEE substance-restriction list
No Moroccan horizontal RoHS instrument equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (as of 2026)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) requiring a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains above threshold / green = below threshold) on EEE sold in China. As of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list. China therefore has a defined restricted-substance baseline that Morocco lacks as a horizontal regime.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），阈值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色＝含量超过限值/绿色＝低于限值）。截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。因此中国具有界定的限用物质基线，而摩洛哥缺乏作为横向制度的等效物。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），閾值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色＝含量超過限值/綠色＝低於限值）。截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。因此中國具有界定的限用物質基線，而摩洛哥缺乏作為橫向制度的等效物。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the EU lane (where the gap is the 4 added phthalates), the Morocco gap runs the other way: Morocco has NO horizontal RoHS market-access condition, so a Chinese product already meeting GB/T 26572 generally faces no additional national substance-restriction list at Moroccan import. The honest, practical takeaways: (1) do not assume Morocco has nothing to satisfy — restricted-substance expectations arrive via buyer/tender specifications and via the material/insulation requirements embedded in the adopted IEC/NM product standards; (2) European or multinational buyers reselling into the EU often contractually require EU-RoHS-level (10-substance) compliance even though Morocco does not mandate it — so the de facto requirement can be set by the buyer, not the state; (3) keep RoHS/substance test reports available, as they are commonly requested commercially; (4) re-check each cycle, since Morocco may introduce or expand substance restrictions over time.
gap.zh: 与欧盟通道（差距在于新增 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）不同，摩洛哥的差距方向相反：摩洛哥没有横向 RoHS 市场准入条件，故已满足 GB/T 26572 的中国产品在摩洛哥进口时通常不面临额外的国家物质限制清单。如实、实务的要点：（1）不要假定摩洛哥无须满足任何要求——限用物质预期通过买方/招标规格、以及采纳的 IEC/NM 产品标准中嵌入的材料/绝缘要求传导；（2）转售至欧盟的欧洲或跨国买方常在合同中要求达到欧盟 RoHS 水平（10 项物质）合规，即便摩洛哥不强制——故事实要求可能由买方而非国家设定；（3）保留 RoHS/物质检测报告备查，商业上常被索取；（4）每周期重新核查，因为摩洛哥可能随时引入或扩大物质限制。
gap.zht: 與歐盟通道（差距在於新增 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）不同，摩洛哥的差距方向相反：摩洛哥沒有橫向 RoHS 市場准入條件，故已滿足 GB/T 26572 的中國產品在摩洛哥進口時通常不面臨額外的國家物質限制清單。如實、實務的要點：（1）不要假定摩洛哥無須滿足任何要求——限用物質預期通過買方/招標規格、以及採納的 IEC/NM 產品標準中嵌入的材料/絕緣要求傳導；（2）轉售至歐盟的歐洲或跨國買方常在合同中要求達到歐盟 RoHS 水平（10 項物質）合規，即便摩洛哥不強制——故事實要求可能由買方而非國家設定；（3）保留 RoHS/物質檢測報告備查，商業上常被索取；（4）每周期重新核查，因為摩洛哥可能隨時引入或擴大物質限制。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent (no horizontal regime) — Morocco has no EU-style RoHS market-access substance-restriction list as of 2026; restricted-substance expectations arrive via general safety law (Law 24-09), adopted IEC/NM product standards, and buyer/tender specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime as a market-access condition — there is no direct local equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU. Restricted-substance expectations arrive through general product-safety law (Law 24-09), the IEC/NM product standards adopted for the product, and especially buyer/tender specifications (European resellers often require EU-RoHS-level compliance contractually). A Chinese product meeting GB/T 26572 generally faces no additional national substance list at import, but keep substance test reports available and re-check each cycle for new restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥没有作为市场准入条件的欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——不存在对应欧盟指令 2011/65/EU 的直接本地等效。限用物质预期通过一般产品安全法（第 24-09 号法律）、为该产品采纳的 IEC/NM 产品标准，尤其是买方/招标规格传导（转售至欧盟的欧洲买方常合同要求达到欧盟 RoHS 水平合规）。满足 GB/T 26572 的中国产品在进口时通常不面临额外的国家物质清单，但请保留物质检测报告备查，并每周期重新核查新限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥沒有作為市場准入條件的歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——不存在對應歐盟指令 2011/65/EU 的直接本地等效。限用物質預期通過一般產品安全法（第 24-09 號法律）、為該產品採納的 IEC/NM 產品標準，尤其是買方/招標規格傳導（轉售至歐盟的歐洲買方常合同要求達到歐盟 RoHS 水平合規）。滿足 GB/T 26572 的中國產品在進口時通常不面臨額外的國家物質清單，但請保留物質檢測報告備查，並每周期重新核查新限制。

requirement_topic.en: Supply-Chain Chemical Notification (no REACH-SVHC Article 33 equivalent in Morocco)
requirement_topic.zh: 供应链化学品通报（摩洛哥无 REACH-SVHC 第 33 条等效）
requirement_topic.zht: 供應鏈化學品通報（摩洛哥無 REACH-SVHC 第 33 條等效）

summary.en: Morocco has no direct equivalent to the EU REACH SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification duty (the EU obligation to proactively inform B2B customers, and consumers on request, when an article contains an ECHA Candidate List substance above 0.1% w/w), and no ECHA-SCIP-style database. Chemical control in Morocco runs through general chemical and hazardous-substance management and product-safety / consumer-protection law (Law 24-09) plus sector rules, not a REACH-style Candidate List with an article-level supply-chain communication mandate. Honest mapping: there is no local instrument that replicates the ongoing REACH SVHC tracking obligation; where SVHC-type control is needed it arrives through buyer requirements and any specific hazardous-chemical labelling/handling rules that apply.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥没有直接对应欧盟 REACH SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报义务的制度（欧盟义务为：当物品含 ECHA 候选清单物质超过 0.1% 质量分数时，主动告知 B2B 客户并应消费者请求告知），也没有 ECHA-SCIP 式数据库。摩洛哥的化学品控制通过一般化学品及危险物质管理、产品安全/消费者保护法（第 24-09 号法律）加部门规则实现，而非带物品级供应链通报强制的 REACH 式候选清单。如实对应：不存在复制 REACH SVHC 持续跟踪义务的本地工具；需要 SVHC 类控制时，通过买方要求及任何适用的危险化学品标签/操作规则传导。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥沒有直接對應歐盟 REACH SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報義務的制度（歐盟義務為：當物品含 ECHA 候選清單物質超過 0.1% 質量分數時，主動告知 B2B 客戶並應消費者請求告知），也沒有 ECHA-SCIP 式數據庫。摩洛哥的化學品控制通過一般化學品及危險物質管理、產品安全/消費者保護法（第 24-09 號法律）加部門規則實現，而非帶物品級供應鏈通報強制的 REACH 式候選清單。如實對應：不存在複製 REACH SVHC 持續跟蹤義務的本地工具；需要 SVHC 類控制時，通過買方要求及任何適用的危險化學品標籤/操作規則傳導。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 24-09 on the safety of products and services (Morocco) — general product-safety / chemical-safety basis
No Moroccan equivalent to REACH (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 or an ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database (as of 2026)

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 article-level supply-chain notification. The closest CN instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) governing new chemical substance registration, and GB 30981-2020 / GB 30000 series for classification and labelling of chemicals. Neither creates an article-level duty to proactively notify B2B customers of SVHC presence above 0.1% w/w. So for this row, both China and Morocco lack a REACH-Article-33-style obligation.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具是《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）规范新化学物质登记，以及 GB 30981-2020 / GB 30000 系列用于化学品分类和标签。二者均未产生在 SVHC 超过 0.1% 质量分数时主动通报 B2B 客户的物品级义务。故就本行而言，中国与摩洛哥均无 REACH 第 33 条式义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具是《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）規範新化學物質登記，以及 GB 30981-2020 / GB 30000 系列用於化學品分類和標籤。二者均未產生在 SVHC 超過 0.1% 質量分數時主動通報 B2B 客戶的物品級義務。故就本行而言，中國與摩洛哥均無 REACH 第 33 條式義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 / GB 30000 series — classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Here neither market imposes a REACH-Article-33-style article-level SVHC communication duty, so a Chinese manufacturer faces no new Moroccan state obligation of this type. The practical caution is commercial, not regulatory: (1) European or multinational buyers who resell into the EU frequently impose REACH SVHC and SCIP-style declarations contractually, so the exporter may still need to track the ECHA Candidate List and respond to buyer requests even though Morocco does not require it; (2) any hazardous-chemical labelling/handling rules under Moroccan law are separate and product/material specific; (3) maintain a basic substance-disclosure capability (full material declaration / SVHC screening) because it is commonly requested in tenders and by EU-facing buyers; (4) re-check each cycle, as Morocco could adopt chemical-notification rules later.
gap.zh: 此处两个市场均不施加 REACH 第 33 条式物品级 SVHC 通报义务，故中国制造商不面临此类新的摩洛哥国家义务。实务上的注意是商业而非监管层面：（1）转售至欧盟的欧洲或跨国买方常在合同中施加 REACH SVHC 及 SCIP 式声明，故即便摩洛哥不要求，出口商仍可能须跟踪 ECHA 候选清单并回应买方请求；（2）摩洛哥法律下任何危险化学品标签/操作规则均为独立项且因产品/材料而异；（3）保持基本的物质披露能力（全材料声明/SVHC 筛查），因为招标及面向欧盟买方常索取；（4）每周期重新核查，因摩洛哥日后可能采纳化学品通报规则。
gap.zht: 此處兩個市場均不施加 REACH 第 33 條式物品級 SVHC 通報義務，故中國製造商不面臨此類新的摩洛哥國家義務。實務上的注意是商業而非監管層面：（1）轉售至歐盟的歐洲或跨國買方常在合同中施加 REACH SVHC 及 SCIP 式聲明，故即便摩洛哥不要求，出口商仍可能須跟蹤 ECHA 候選清單並回應買方請求；（2）摩洛哥法律下任何危險化學品標籤/操作規則均為獨立項且因產品/材料而異；（3）保持基本的物質披露能力（全材料聲明/SVHC 篩查），因為招標及面向歐盟買方常索取；（4）每周期重新核查，因摩洛哥日後可能採納化學品通報規則。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Morocco has no REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty and no ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database (as of 2026); chemical control runs through general safety law and buyer requirements
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty either (as of 2026)

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Neither Morocco nor China has a REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, and Morocco has no ECHA Candidate List / SCIP equivalent. So there is no new Moroccan state obligation of this type for a Chinese exporter. The real driver is commercial: EU-facing buyers reselling into the EU often impose REACH SVHC / SCIP-style declarations contractually, so maintain SVHC screening and a material-declaration capability and re-check each cycle for any future Moroccan chemical rules.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥与中国均无 REACH 第 33 条式物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务，且摩洛哥无 ECHA 候选清单/SCIP 等效。故对中国出口商而言不存在此类新的摩洛哥国家义务。真正的驱动是商业层面：转售至欧盟的面向欧盟买方常在合同中施加 REACH SVHC / SCIP 式声明，故请保持 SVHC 筛查及材料声明能力，并每周期重新核查摩洛哥未来可能的化学品规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥與中國均無 REACH 第 33 條式物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，且摩洛哥無 ECHA 候選清單/SCIP 等效。故對中國出口商而言不存在此類新的摩洛哥國家義務。真正的驅動是商業層面：轉售至歐盟的面向歐盟買方常在合同中施加 REACH SVHC / SCIP 式聲明，故請保持 SVHC 篩查及材料聲明能力，並每周期重新核查摩洛哥未來可能的化學品規則。

requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity Attestation and In-Country Importer (Ministry of Industry) vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 进口符合性认证与在摩进口商（工业部）vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 進口符合性認證與在摩進口商（工業部）vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: The overarching market-access mechanism for regulated electrical products in Morocco is mandatory import conformity / attestation administered by the Ministry of Industry. For regulated products, a conformity attestation (an attestation-of-conformity / CMIM-type requirement) is required, typically supported by test reports to the applicable IMANOR NM standards (adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, etc.) from an accredited laboratory. Key structural features: (1) an in-country importer / local entity is required to act as the responsible party and to handle the conformity and customs formalities; (2) goods clear at ports such as Casablanca and Tanger Med, where non-conforming or non-attested regulated products can be blocked; (3) wireless products additionally need ANRT approval (see ledma-emc-02); (4) energy labelling applies separately where the product is in scope (see ledma-ecodesign). The deliverable is a Moroccan conformity attestation file via the importer, not a CE/CCC certificate.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥受管制电气产品的总体市场准入机制是由工业部管理的强制进口符合性/认证。对于受管制产品，须取得符合性认证（认证/CMIM 类要求），通常以来自认可实验室、依据适用 IMANOR NM 标准（采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 等）的检测报告为支撑。主要结构特征：（1）须有在摩进口商/本地实体作为责任方并办理符合性及海关手续；（2）货物在卡萨布兰卡、丹吉尔地中海港（Tanger Med）等口岸清关，不符合或未认证的受管制产品可在该处被拦截；（3）无线产品另需 ANRT 核准（见 ledma-emc-02）；（4）能效标签在产品适用时单独适用（见 ledma-ecodesign）。交付物是经进口商提交的摩洛哥符合性认证文件，而非 CE/CCC 证书。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥受管制電氣產品的總體市場准入機制是由工業部管理的強制進口符合性/認證。對於受管制產品，須取得符合性認證（認證/CMIM 類要求），通常以來自認可實驗室、依據適用 IMANOR NM 標準（採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 等）的檢測報告為支撐。主要結構特徵：（1）須有在摩進口商/本地實體作為責任方並辦理符合性及海關手續；（2）貨物在卡薩布蘭卡、丹吉爾地中海港（Tanger Med）等口岸清關，不符合或未認證的受管制產品可在該處被攔截；（3）無線產品另需 ANRT 核准（見 ledma-emc-02）；（4）能效標籤在產品適用時單獨適用（見 ledma-ecodesign）。交付物是經進口商提交的摩洛哥符合性認證文件，而非 CE/CCC 證書。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation regime for regulated electrical products (attestation-of-conformity / CMIM-type requirement), Morocco
IMANOR NM standards (adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471) used as the technical basis for the conformity attestation

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) and delivered by authorized bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre); CQC voluntary certification covers products outside mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC is a domestic third-party certification scheme tied to Chinese GB standards; it is not recognised for the Moroccan import-conformity attestation, which is built on IMANOR NM standards and the Ministry of Industry process.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理，并由中国质量认证中心（CQC）等授权机构实施；CQC 自愿性认证涵盖强制 CCC 之外的产品。对于具备无线功能的灯具，另需 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 是与中国 GB 标准绑定的国内第三方认证方案；其不被摩洛哥进口符合性认证所认可，后者建立在 IMANOR NM 标准及工业部流程之上。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理，並由中國質量認證中心（CQC）等授權機構實施；CQC 自願性認證涵蓋強制 CCC 之外的產品。對於具備無線功能的燈具，另需 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 是與中國 GB 標準綁定的國內第三方認證方案；其不被摩洛哥進口符合性認證所認可，後者建立在 IMANOR NM 標準及工業部流程之上。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Morocco's import-conformity attestation and China's CCC are parallel, non-mutual schemes — a CCC certificate is not accepted as the Moroccan deliverable. Key gaps with no CN equivalent: (1) an in-country importer / local responsible entity is mandatory and holds the conformity and customs obligations (versus EU's Authorised Representative or CN's domestic certificate holder); (2) the conformity attestation is built on IMANOR NM (IEC-based) references, so test reports should be to those NM/IEC standards from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab and accepted by the conformity body; (3) clearance happens at the port (Casablanca / Tanger Med) where non-attested regulated goods can be blocked, so the attestation must precede or accompany import; (4) wireless products need ANRT approval and in-scope products need the Moroccan energy label — additional steps beyond the safety attestation. Plan for the importer relationship early, as it is the linchpin of Moroccan market access.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥进口符合性认证与中国 CCC 为并行、不互认的方案——CCC 证书不被接受为摩洛哥交付物。无中国对应的主要差距：（1）须有在摩进口商/本地责任实体，并承担符合性及海关义务（相对于欧盟授权代表或中国国内证书持有人）；（2）符合性认证建立在 IMANOR NM（基于 IEC）引用之上，故检测报告应依据这些 NM/IEC 标准、来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并为合格评定机构所接受；（3）清关在口岸（卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港）进行，未认证的受管制货物可在此被拦截，故认证须先于或随进口提交；（4）无线产品需 ANRT 核准，范围内产品需摩洛哥能效标签——均为安全认证之外的额外步骤。请尽早安排进口商关系，因其是摩洛哥市场准入的关键枢纽。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥進口符合性認證與中國 CCC 為並行、不互認的方案——CCC 證書不被接受為摩洛哥交付物。無中國對應的主要差距：（1）須有在摩進口商/本地責任實體，並承擔符合性及海關義務（相對於歐盟授權代表或中國國內證書持有人）；（2）符合性認證建立在 IMANOR NM（基於 IEC）引用之上，故檢測報告應依據這些 NM/IEC 標準、來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並為合格評定機構所接受；（3）清關在口岸（卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港）進行，未認證的受管制貨物可在此被攔截，故認證須先於或隨進口提交；（4）無線產品需 ANRT 核准，範圍內產品需摩洛哥能效標籤——均為安全認證之外的額外步驟。請盡早安排進口商關係，因其是摩洛哥市場准入的關鍵樞紐。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — import conformity / attestation administered by the Ministry of Industry required for regulated electrical products before market placement; an in-country importer / local responsible entity is required; clearance at Casablanca / Tanger Med
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Ministere de l'Industrie et du Commerce (Ministry of Industry and Trade), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moroccan market access for regulated LED products runs through a mandatory import-conformity / attestation process administered by the Ministry of Industry, built on IMANOR NM (IEC-based) references and requiring an in-country importer as the responsible party — a CCC certificate is not the deliverable. Provide ILAC-recognised NM/IEC test reports accepted by the conformity body, arrange attestation before port clearance (Casablanca / Tanger Med), and add ANRT approval for wireless products and the energy label for in-scope products. CCC and the Moroccan attestation are parallel, non-mutual schemes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 受管制 LED 产品的摩洛哥市场准入通过工业部管理的强制进口符合性/认证流程实现，建立在 IMANOR NM（基于 IEC）引用之上，并要求在摩进口商作为责任方——CCC 证书并非交付物。请提供为合格评定机构所接受的 ILAC 认可 NM/IEC 检测报告，在口岸清关（卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港）前办理认证，并为无线产品加 ANRT 核准、为范围内产品加能效标签。CCC 与摩洛哥认证为并行、不互认的方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 受管制 LED 產品的摩洛哥市場准入通過工業部管理的強制進口符合性/認證流程實現，建立在 IMANOR NM（基於 IEC）引用之上，並要求在摩進口商作為責任方——CCC 證書並非交付物。請提供為合格評定機構所接受的 ILAC 認可 NM/IEC 檢測報告，在口岸清關（卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港）前辦理認證，並為無線產品加 ANRT 核准、為範圍內產品加能效標籤。CCC 與摩洛哥認證為並行、不互認的方案。
